name: reposeiri
description: Codex adapter for canonical RepoSeiri audit queries, dry-run planning, and PR drafts.

interface.shortDescription: Review repository organization through typed RepoSeiri queries.
interface.longDescription: RepoSeiri uses one canonical Rust analysis and a bounded query surface to inspect repository routes, evidence, governance, dry-run patch plans, and draft PR bodies without reproducing decisions in the plugin.
defaultPrompt: Show safe and blocked repo fixes.
